characters.appearance: Elderly South Asian woman. Short stature, wrinkled face.
characters.wardrobe: Floral salwar kameez, brown cardigan, and later a brown hijab.

characters.appearance: Young white male. Short brown hair.
White humanoid robot. Blue eyes, glowing blue circle on chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Wait, wait... you're telling us you started learning English just a few months ago, and now you're speaking so confidently? [Wait, wait... you're telling us you started learning English just a few months ago, and now you're speaking so confidently?]
Character A says: हाँ बेटा, बिल्कुल! पहले English बोलने में बहुत डर लगता था, सिर्फ किताबें पढ़ी थीं। But now, I speak without hesitation. [Yes son, absolutely! Earlier I used to be very scared to speak English, had only read books. But now, I speak without hesitation.]
Character A says: सच बताऊँ? The secret is daily practice. और मुझे Supernova app पर सबसे बढ़िया AI tutor मिल गया। Let me show you. [To tell you the truth? The secret is daily practice. And I found the best AI tutor on the Supernova app. Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable transformation story.
- Establishes the core problem (fear of speaking despite knowing bookish English).
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution for daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Wait, wait... you're telling us you started learning English just a few months ago, and now you're speaking so confidently?
हाँ बेटा, बिल्कुल! पहले English बोलने में बहुत डर लगता था, सिर्फ किताबें पढ़ी थीं। But now, I speak without hesitation.
सच बताऊँ? The secret is daily practice. और मुझे Supernova app पर सबसे बढ़िया AI tutor मिल गया। Let me show you.

scenes.supernova_script: Character C says: क्या आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं? It's not magic, it's Supernova. ये app आपको बोलते वक़्त correct करता है, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। Let's try it together. [Do you also want to speak English without fear? It's not magic, it's Supernova. This app corrects you while you speak, just like a friend. Let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the hook to the product introduction.
- Strips away the unrealistic '1 week' claim, replacing it with a focus on overcoming fear.
- Highlights the core feature: real-time, friendly correction.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
क्या आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं? It's not magic, it's Supernova. ये app आपको बोलते वक़्त correct करता है, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। Let's try it together.
SPEAK ENGLISH WITH CONFIDENCE!
Speak & Learn English: Supernova. Practice Daily.
WOW, This is the most effective way of learning English!!
Select Your Tutor. Mateo. Spanish. Energetic. Witty. Articulate. Travel. Socialization.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: A little bit. [A little bit.]
Character C says: Where do you live? [Where do you live?]
Character A says: I am London. [I am London.]
Character C says: Almost. You should say, I live in London. [Almost. You should say, I live in London.]
Character A says: अरे हाँ, I always mix that up. [Oh yes, I always mix that up.]
Character C says: कोई बात नहीं! That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly. [No problem! That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly.]
Character A says: But private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But private tutors are very expensive.]
Character C says: Supernova is very affordable. आपको महँगी classes की ज़रूरत नहीं है। You get daily conversation practice anytime, anywhere. [Supernova is very affordable. You don't need expensive classes. You get daily conversation practice anytime, anywhere.]
Character A says: Are you serious? [Are you serious?]
Character C says: Absolutely. मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करूँगा, so you can speak with confidence. [Absolutely. I will correct your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay! I am going to download Supernova right now. [Okay! I am going to download Supernova right now.]
Character C says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction style.
- Addresses the cost barrier by positioning Supernova as an affordable alternative to private tutors (removing the 'free' claim).
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call to action from the user's perspective.

A little bit.

I am London.

Supernova is very affordable. आपको महँगी classes की ज़रूरत नहीं है। You get daily conversation practice anytime, anywhere.
Are you serious?
Absolutely. मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करूँगा, so you can speak with confidence.
Okay! I am going to download Supernova right now.
Great decision. Let's speak English together.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides the final visual call to action.
- Displays the Supernova branding and app store availability.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING.
Supernova.
Download on the App Store.
GET IT ON Google Play.
